name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_SpecialMeasures
title: R5: specialMeasures additional types
description: R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.specialMeasures` additional types (CodeableConcept) additional types from child elements (coding)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.specialMeasures` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.specialMeasures` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.specialMeasures` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.specialMeasures` 0..* `CodeableConcept`
*  R4: `MedicinalProduct.specialMeasures` 0..* `string`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.specialMeasures` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `MedicinalProduct.specialMeasures` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.specialMeasures` do not cover the following types: CodeableConcept.
The mappings for `MedicinalProductDefinition.specialMeasures` do not cover the following types based on type expansion: coding.

element.short: Whether the Medicinal Product is subject to special measures for regulatory reasons
element.definition: Whether the Medicinal Product is subject to special measures for regulatory reasons, such as a requirement to conduct post-authorization studies.

binding.description: Extra measures defined for a Medicinal Product, such as a requirement to conduct post-authorization studies.
